posts.title: Issue #38
posts.summary: Anatomy of the .claude/ Folder DAILYDODEOFDS.COM Last week I shared a Claude Code Cheat Sheet that I am finding very useful. Claude Code, like many chat interfaces, has a discoverability issue (something I wrote about just over a year ago ), it is far from obvious what it is capable of, and in the AI-age we are even less likely to read the manual. This blog post is a great complement to the Cheat Sheet, taking a really deep dive into how your Claude Code configuration is encoded via the various files and folder structures. I’m guilty of treating the .claude folder as a black box, just post…
posts.author: Colin Eberhardt
